Off Calendar Apr-04-2012 Text Ruling

APPEARANCES - ATTY. RAY W. SHERMAN JR. OF SHERMAN & FELLER, TEL. NO. (510) 452-3222 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. DENNIS R. WHEELER, TEL. NO. 865-0212 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - THE MATTER WAS NOT ARGUED. DEFENDANT AND JUDGMENT DEBTOR JOHN MCGOVERN'S Claim Of Homestead Exemption IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $100,000.00 WITHOUT OBJECTION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077 = (302/HEK)

Order To Show Cause Why Sale Of Dwelling Should Not Issue
Off Calendar Mar-20-2012 Continued To Apr-04-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ray Sherman, Esq., of Sherman & Feller, Tel. 510.452.3222, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party.
John McGovern, Tel. 415.999.7321, defendant and opposing party, appearing on his own behalf.

RULING: The matter was discussed. ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE WHY SALE OF DWELLING SHOULD NOT ISSUE - After hearing and for good cause, the court continued the hearing to April 4, 2012 at 9:30 am in Department 302. Defendant was strongly advised to obtain an attorney or seek legal aid and to file a written opposition to support his homestead exemption claim by April 2, 2012. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Notice And Motion To Fix Amount Of Attorney'S Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jun-11-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Plaintiff's Motion to Fix Amount of Attorney's Fees Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Ray Sherman, Esq. for Plaintiffs: Susan Tweddle and David Conroy.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court grated the Motion and Amended the Judgment in favor of the Plaintiffs and against the Defendant: John McGovern as follows:
Total Damages $160,787.00
Total Prejudgment Interest $31,087.60
Total Attorney's Fees $1,119.50
Grand total of $192,994.10 (see scanned doc for break down of the Judgment)
Judgment signed in open court.

Notice And Motion To Fix Amount Of Attorney'S Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jun-05-2009 Continued To Jun-11-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Motion After Entry of Default Judgment to Fix Amount of Attorney's Fees this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
After hearing the argument presented, the Court rules continued the matter to June 11, 2009 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-14-2009 Off Calendar

Notice And Motion To Fix Amount Of Attorney'S Fees And Costs
Off Calendar May-28-2009 Continued To Jun-04-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218

Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Apr-14-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. Frank Drago, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Ray W. Sherman, Jr., Esq. appeared with plaintiffs Susan Tweddle and David Conroy, who were placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant John McGovern.
Default was entered against defendant on January 20, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, April 14, 2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiffs Susan Tweddle and David Conroy, and against the Defaulted Defendant John McGovern as follows:

As to Plaintiff Susan Tweddle:

Damages/Principal - $97,900.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $15,543.80.
Attorney's Fees - Reserved.
Punitive Damages - Reserved.
Costs - $559.75, for a total judgment in the amount of $114,003.55.

As to Plaintiff David Conroy:

Damages/Principal - $62,887.00.
Prejudgment Interest - $15,543.80.
Attorney's Fees - Reserved.
Punitive Damages - Reserved.
Costs - $559.75, for a total judgment in the amount of $78,990.55.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-13-2009 Continued To May-29-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
